creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hello Sato Kuro,

I am working on this PR and plan to commit the changes soon.  However,
it appears to me that the following ports depend on this one:

comms/xastir
graphics/gimp-gmic-plugin

Can you check them to see if they are candidates for a shlib bump and if
they work correctly with GM 1.3.14?

Thank you,
Greg

- -- 
Greg Larkin
